name: World Class Limo
recent_news: No M&A or notable news identified. Listed in FMCSA SAFER as World Class Limousine LLC; ABC Limousine and other Norcross-area limo operators dominate web results.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee Norcross limousine/livery service flagged as 'special_needs' in source data but school=0; no evidence of school-bus contracting, district customers, or yellow-bus fleet. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Zoom Limousine
recent_news: No M&A or operational news identified. No public website or district contracts found; Lawrenceville/Gwinnett area limo operator with only 2 employees.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Microscale 2-person Lawrenceville limousine service; no school-bus operations, no district customers, no fleet scale. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in thesis (yellow-bus and SPED contractors).

name: ABC Limousine Network Inc
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Distinct from larger Atlanta ABC Limousine Service LLC (atlabclimos.com, Norcross); ABC Limousine Network is a smaller Austell-based livery with 2 employees.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Small Austell limo/event transport provider, not a school-bus contractor. No yellow-bus fleet, no district relationships. Excluded from Summit tuck-in universe.

fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee Smyrna limo operator with PO Box only; no evidence of school-bus or SPED contracts, no fleet scale. Out of scope for Summit.

name: Affinity Limousine Inc
